name: Medium Faceoff
description: Close crop on two or more figures in direct tension.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Two figures in close confrontation, facing each other.
{setting}. A tense face-to-face standoff, tight framing.
{setting}. Figures squared off at close range, the space between them charged.
background_pool: A close wall of stained concrete behind the figures, graffiti tags barely visible in the shadows, a flickering fluorescent light mounted overhead, the space cramped and airless
The interior of a dimly lit bar, bottles glowing amber on shelves behind the figures, nicotine-stained ceiling tiles, the close press of a room that feels too small
A narrow alley squeezed between brick tenements, fire escape ladders cutting diagonal lines, a dumpster and trash bags compressed to one side, a sliver of grey sky above
An office hallway, dropped ceiling tiles, beige carpet, fluorescent panels casting flat light, a water cooler and framed prints on the wall behind the figures
action_pool: stepping forward into the other's space
chin dipped, eyes looking up through their brows
shoulders raised, fists guarding their face
turning their head slightly, listening for movement behind
hand flat against the other's chest, pushing back
